procedures.title: Updating firmware
procedures.snippet: 5.3. Updating firmware The firmware can be checked and updated with the VictronConnect app. • Connect to the solar charger. • Perform a firmware update.
procedures.excerpt_text:
5.3. Updating firmware
The firmware can be checked and updated with the VictronConnect app.
• Connect to the solar charger.
• Perform a firmware update.

procedures.title: Disabling and enabling Bluetooth
procedures.snippet: 5.4. Disabling and enabling Bluetooth Bluetooth is by default enabled. It can be disabled or enabled via the VictronConnect app. To disable or enable Bluetooth: • Connect with the VictronConnect app.
procedures.excerpt_text:
5.4. Disabling and enabling Bluetooth
Bluetooth is by default enabled. It can be disabled or enabled via the VictronConnect app.
To disable or enable Bluetooth:
• Connect with the VictronConnect app.

procedures.title: Setting the Sunset action
procedures.snippet: Setting the Sunset action At sunset you can choose any of the following actions: • Keep the lights off • Switch on for a fixed time
procedures.excerpt_text:
Setting the Sunset action
At sunset you can choose any of the following actions:
• Keep the lights off
• Switch on for a fixed time

alternatives.title: GX device or GlobalLink 520
alternatives.snippet: GX device or GlobalLink 520, or any other device that needs to communicate via VE.Direct.

note: Synthetic routed-excerpt inventory pin for v4.2. Live last_green inventories are regenerated by scripts/run_procedure_inventory.py.
